name: Fra-Nosuke (Reprint)
effect_text: [DON!! x1] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains [Rush]. (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP05 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
